aaliyah nye.comment: Nye (knee) has been ruled out for Monday's game against the Tempo.

brionna jones.comment: The Dream expect Jones (knee) to resume team activities in the coming weeks, per Myles Ehrlich of Winsidr.com.

courtney vandersloot.comment: Vandersloot (knee) does not have a timetable to return to the court.

dijonai carrington.comment: Carrington (foot) remains without a timetable to return.

rickea jackson.comment: The Sky announced Tuesday that Jackson will miss the remainder of the season after suffering a torn ACL in her left knee during Sunday's 86-79 win over the Lynx.

saniya rivers.comment: Rivers won't return to Monday's game against the Sky due to a left ankle sprain, and she'll finish with four points (0-2 FG, 4-4 FT), three rebounds and one block in 13 minutes.

ashlon jackson.comment: Jackson (coach's decision) won't play in Monday's game against Chicago.

hailey van lith.comment: Van Lith (ankle) has been ruled out for Monday's matchup with the Sky.

odyssey sims.comment: Sims (ankle) is listed as out for Monday's game against the Storm.

tiffany hayes.comment: Hayes (undisclosed) exited Sunday's 92-73 loss to the Aces in the fourth quarter and did not return, finishing with seven points (3-8 FG, 0-3 3Pt, 1-2 FT), one rebound and one assist in 19 minutes.

miela sowah.comment: Sowah (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Sunday's game against the Aces.

ashten prechtel.comment: Prechtel (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Sunday's game against the Aces.

iliana rupert.comment: Rupert is pregnant, and the Valkyries have filed for a replacement contract ahead of the 2026 season, Alexa Philippou of ESPN.com reports Thursday.

justine pissott.comment: Pissott (coach's decision) is listed as out for Monday's game against Phoenix.

bree hall.comment: Hall (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Monday's game against Phoenix.

cameron brink.comment: Brink (ankle), who has already been ruled out for Wednesday's game against Minnesota, is expected to miss multiple contests, per David Mendez-Yapkowitz of ClutchPoints.com.

janiah barker.comment: Barker (leg) is listed as out for Tuesday's game against the Liberty.

chennedy carter.comment: Carter (illness) has been ruled out for Tuesday's game against the Liberty.

dana evans.comment: Evans (leg) has been ruled out for Saturday's game against the Lynx.

napheesa collier.comment: Collier (ankle) has yet to resume full on-court activities, per Andrew Dukowitz of ZoneCoverage.com.

dorka juhasz.comment: Juhasz (foot) is expected to remain out for another 2-to-3 weeks, Pat Borzi of MinnPost reports.

emma cechova.comment: Cechova (knee) was diagnosed with a torn ACL in her right knee and will undergo surgery, Meghan L. Hall of USA Today reports. She will miss the remainder of the season.

marta suarez.comment: Suarez (coach's decision) is listed as out for Monday's game against Indiana.

jovana nogic.comment: The Mercury temporarily suspended Nogic's (not with team) contract Saturday.

sami whitcomb.comment: Whitcomb will undergo an arthroscopy on Thursday to remove a loose body in her left knee. She will be re-evaluated in four to six weeks, Shane Young of the Mercury's official site reports.

jordan harrison.comment: Harrison (coach's decision) won't suit up for Wednesday's game against the Storm.

ezi magbegor.comment: Head coach Sonia Raman said Monday that Magbegor (foot) is progressing well and has advanced to 5-on-5 work, Roberta Rodrigues of Beta Basket reports.

jordan horston.comment: Horston (foot) is out for Monday's meeting with the Wings.

brittney sykes.comment: Sykes (foot) will be re-evaluated in the coming weeks, according to WNBA reporter Kareem Copeland.

kiki rice.comment: Rice (ankle) remains sidelined by a Grade 3 left ankle sprain, according to WNBA reporter Kareem Copeland.
